what_it_does: Defines a 24 by 24 SVG outline icon depicting a cloud, drawn with a single stroked path that inherits the current text color.
observations: The SVG uses viewBox "0 0 24 24" with explicit width and height of 24.
The shape is rendered with no fill and a currentColor stroke.
Stroke styling uses width 1.5 with round line caps and round line joins.
A single path draws the cloud outline using horizontal, arc, and close commands.
standouts: Color inheritance through currentColor makes the icon themeable.
The entire cloud glyph is encoded as one path.
conventions: Uses a compact inline SVG asset format.
Follows common 24px outline icon conventions: no fill, stroked path, rounded endpoints, rounded joins.
concerns: No title, description, role, or aria attributes are present, so accessible labeling depends on the consumer.
notes: This file is a standalone themeable cloud outline SVG icon.
questions: Should this icon be treated as decorative by default, or receive an accessible label from its usage context?
purpose_vs_actual: The filename indicates a cloud icon, and the SVG content renders a cloud outline.
intention_signals: It appears intended to provide a reusable cloud icon whose stroke color adapts to surrounding UI color.
contribution: Provides a compact, scalable, color-inheriting cloud outline glyph for interfaces that need a weather, upload, storage, or cloud-related visual signifier.
summary_for_embedding: A standalone 24px SVG cloud outline icon using a single currentColor stroked path with rounded caps and joins.
intention_for_embedding: This asset was for reusable themeable cloud iconography within a design system or UI asset set.
